layout: default title: "Welcome"

FightRise Wiki

Welcome to the FightRise documentation wiki. FightRise is a Discord bot and web portal for running Start.gg fighting game tournaments entirely within Discord.

Getting Started

Use the sidebar to navigate through the documentation:

Guide Description
Discord Setup Configure the Discord bot
Start.gg Setup Set up Start.gg API access
Tunnel Setup Configure Cloudflare Tunnel for OAuth
TO Quickstart Tournament organizer guide
Player Quickstart Player guide
Architecture System architecture overview
API Reference Web API documentation
